title: Notification issued u/s 7(1) (b) of COFEPOSA Act against Shri Swadhin Sarkar
description: Notification issued u/s 7(1) (b) of COFEPOSA Act against Shri Swadhin Sarkar
text: Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) (CENTRAL ECONOMIC INTELLIGENCE BUREAU) (COFEPOSA UNIT) ORDER New Delhi, the 13th February, 2013 Whereas the Joint Secretary to the Government of India, specially empowered under sub-section (1) of section 3 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974) issued order F.No. 673/11/2012-Cus.VIII dated 11.01.2013 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Swadhin Sarkar, S/o Late Narayan Sarkar, R/o Village-Jot Chaipara, P.O. Jayenpur, P.S. Baishnavnagar, Distt. Malda, West Bengal, be detained and kept in custody in the Berhampore Correctional Home, Berhampore with a view to preventing him from smuggling goods in future. 2. Whereas the Central Government has reasons to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or is concealing himself so that the order cannot be executed. 3. Now therefore, in exercise of the power conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 7 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before the Director General of Police, Government of West Bengal, Kolkata within 7 days of the publication of this order in the official Gazette. [F.No. 673/11/2012-Cus.VIII] Harmeet S. Singh, jt. Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
